differential_diagnoses: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (specifically with optic perineuritis)
next_steps: Perform serum ANA, ENA (anti-Ro, anti-La), and anti-dsDNA antibody testing to evaluate for connective tissue disease
Obtain tissue biopsy of the orbital lesion (if feasible) for histopathology and IgG4 immunostaining
Conduct a full-body PET/CT scan to screen for occult malignancy or systemic inflammatory foci
Perform indirect immunofluorescence on the previous skin biopsy or a new biopsy of active rash to confirm subacute cutaneous lupus erythematosus
Initiate systemic corticosteroid therapy to manage progressive orbital inflammation while awaiting confirmatory testing
